# Project Overview

Chroma is a Digital Audio Workstation. Currently in development by Tyler Martin, Riley Frazier, and Jason Reid. We are focusing on beginner friendly UI, custom plugin integration as well as plugin hosting, and a competitive audio engine design using the JUCE Framework!

## Future Development

- Polishing UI
- Mix & Master Track Integration
- Custom Plugins
- Third Party Plugin Hosting
- Piano Roll Integration
